validation.pattern: Shiver me timbers! Enter a valid {{lowerFirst(#label)}}
validation.format: Blimey! Enter {{lowerFirst(#label)}} in the correct format
validation.max: {{#label}} must be {{#limit}} characters or fewer, ye blabberin' sea dog
validation.min: {{#label}} must be at least {{#limit}} characters, ye miserly landlubber
validation.minMax: {{#label}} must be between {{#min}} and {{#max}} characters, no more no less
validation.number: {{#label}} must be a number, ye innumerate buccaneer
validation.numberPrecision: {{#label}} must have {{#limit}} or fewer decimal places, arrr
validation.numberInteger: {{#label}} must be a whole number — no fractions on the high seas
validation.numberMin: {{#label}} must be {{#limit}} or higher, ye cheapskate
validation.numberMax: {{#label}} must be {{#limit}} or lower, ye greedy pirate
validation.maxWords: {{#label}} must be {{#limit}} words or fewer, ye long-winded bilge rat

common.saveAndExit: Stow yer progress an' abandon ship

question.paymentCancelledTitle: Yer payment has walked the plank
question.paymentCancelledBody: Yer payment details were cast into Davy Jones' locker because the form was idle for 5 days.
question.paymentCancelledAction: Enter yer payment details again, if ye be brave enough.
question.backToCheckAnswers: Back to check yer answers, ye forgetful swab

summary.title: Check yer answers before sendin' yer form
summary.saveAndExit: Stow yer progress an' abandon ship
summary.paymentSuccessBody: Yer payment be held in the crow's nest. We'll charge ye when ye submit the form.
summary.submissionFailed: There be a problem and yer form was not submitted. Try submittin' the form again
summary.submissionFailedContactSuffix: or ye can [[contactUsLink]] and quote yer scroll number to arrange a refund
summary.contactUsLinkText: contact the crew (opens in new tab)

repeater.removeAnswer: Are ye sure ye want to cast this answer overboard, arrr?
repeater.saveAndExit: Stow yer progress an' abandon ship
repeater.tooMany_one: Ye can only add up to [[count]] answer, ye greedy pirate
repeater.tooMany_other: Ye can only add up to [[count]] answers, ye greedy pirate
repeater.tooFew_one: Ye must add at least [[count]] answer or walk the plank
repeater.tooFew_other: Ye must add at least [[count]] answers or walk the plank

fileUpload.maxFilesReached: Ye have reached the maximum number of files. Cast one overboard before ye hoist any more.

exit.defaultTitle: Yer progress has been stowed in the hold
exit.whatHappensNext: What happens next on yer voyage
exit.body: Yer form progress has been stowed in the hold. Ye can return to complete yer application at any time using the link provided.

confirmation.whatHappensNext: What happens next on yer voyage
confirmation.feedbackLink: What do ye think of this service? (takes 30 seconds, even for a pirate)

warnMissingNotificationEmail.body: If ye want to receive a test email, [[link]] ye want form submissions to go to.
warnMissingNotificationEmail.linkText: enter the email address (opens in new tab)

validation.dateFormat: {{#title}} must be a real date, not some made-up nonsense
validation.dateMin: {{#title}} must be the same as or after {{#limit}}, ye time-traveller
validation.dateMax: {{#title}} must be the same as or before {{#limit}}, ye time-traveller

addressField.enterManually: enter address manually, ye stubborn sea dog

latLongField.latitudeRequired: Enter latitude or ye'll never find the treasure
latLongField.longitudeRequired: Enter longitude or ye'll never find the treasure
latLongField.precision: {{#label}} must have no more than 7 decimal places, arrr
latLongField.notANumber: {{#label}} must be a valid number, ye innumerate buccaneer
latLongField.latitudeBase: Enter a valid latitude for [[fieldLabel]] like 51.519450 — X marks the spot!
latLongField.longitudeBase: Enter a valid longitude for [[fieldLabel]] like -0.127758 — X marks the spot!
latLongField.latitudeRange: Latitude for [[fieldLabel]] must be between [[min]] and [[max]] — outside that be dragons
latLongField.longitudeRange: Longitude for [[fieldLabel]] must be between [[min]] and [[max]] — outside that be dragons

eastingNorthingField.easting: Easting (how far East on the treasure map)
eastingNorthingField.northing: Northing (how far North on the treasure map)
eastingNorthingField.eastingRequired: Enter easting or ye'll be lost at sea
eastingNorthingField.northingRequired: Enter northing or ye'll be lost at sea
eastingNorthingField.eastingDigits: {{#label}} for [[fieldLabel]] must be between 1 and 6 digits, landlubber
eastingNorthingField.northingDigits: {{#label}} for [[fieldLabel]] must be between 1 and 7 digits, landlubber
eastingNorthingField.eastingRange: {{#label}} for [[fieldLabel]] must be between [[min]] and [[max]] — outside that be dragons
eastingNorthingField.northingRange: {{#label}} for [[fieldLabel]] must be between [[min]] and [[max]] — outside that be dragons

nationalGridField.pattern: Enter a valid National Grid reference for {{lowerFirst(#title)}} like NG 1234 5678 — even a parrot could do it
nationalGridField.howToFind: How to find yer location on the treasure map

osGridRefField.pattern: Enter a valid OS grid reference for {{lowerFirst(#title)}} like TQ123456 — even a parrot could do it
osGridRefField.howToFind: How to find yer location on the treasure map

locationFieldBase.howToFind: How to find yer location on the treasure map

validation.selectYesNoRequired: {{#label}} — say aye or nay, ye indecisive landlubber

declarationField.defaultLabel: Aye, I understand an' agree, on me honour as a pirate
declarationField.defaultConfirmationLabel: I swear on Davy Jones' locker that I understand and accept this declaration

validation.declarationRequired: Ye must confirm ye understand and agree with the {{lowerFirst(#label)}} to continue, or walk the plank

geospatialField.added_one: Ye've marked [[count]] location on the treasure map
geospatialField.added_other: Ye've marked [[count]] locations on the treasure map

paymentField.pendingTransaction: Ye may see a pending transaction in yer treasure chest but ye'll only be charged when ye submit the form.
paymentField.cannotTakePayment: There be a problem and we cannot take yer plunder. Contact the crew (details in the footer of this form) or stow yer progress and return later.
paymentField.testApiKey: Add a valid test API key before ye can preview the payment journey, ye scallywag.
paymentField.paymentExpired: Yer payment authorisation has expired and sunk to the ocean floor. Add yer payment details again.
paymentField.submissionFailed: There be a problem and yer form was not submitted. Try submittin' the form again.
paymentField.canSubmitAfterPayment: Ye can submit the form after ye have handed over yer plunder.
paymentField.preAuthorisedTitle: Ye have already authorised a payment for this form, ye keen pirate
paymentField.preAuthorisedBody: Continue to submit the form. Ye will not be charged twice, ye have me word as a pirate.

fileUploadField.uploadFailed: There be a problem with yer hoisted files. Re-hoist them before submittin' the form again.
